## Acceptance-criteria coverage

## Browser validation

Describe Playwright coverage or explain why browser coverage is not applicable.

## Dependency changes

List additions/upgrades and explain necessity, alternatives, runtime impact, license, maintenance, and security implications. Write `None` when unchanged.

## Risk and privacy review

- Risk: low / medium / high
- [ ] Local-first behavior is preserved.
- [ ] No XML or configuration content is transmitted externally without explicit approval.
- [ ] The strict graph allowlist and snapshot-scoped resolution are preserved.
- [ ] Persisted formats, graph schema, authentication, credentials, and destructive behavior are unchanged, or the PR is marked high risk.

## Jules checklist

- [ ] One primary Issue only.
- [ ] Targeted regression tests added or updated.
- [ ] No failures, warnings, browser errors, or findings were suppressed.
